bits.premise: The only Black in-law becomes the family Black-culture expert.

lines.text: - Hey, I am in an interracial marriage
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And so I'm the only black person in my husband's family.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And because of that,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: they always have annoying-ass questions for me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: One time my sister-in-law was like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Hey, Candace, can you please talk to the kids
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "about Juneteenth?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And that shit pissed me to fuck off.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause then I had to go look up what Juneteenth was.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I had absolutely no idea.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I snuck in the bathroom and searched that shit on Google.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I was like, "Oh, this why I was off work on Monday?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: "Oh, okay."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Since they always got questions for me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I decided to start making shit up,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: just giving us superpowers.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They asked me a dumb question,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I give them a dumb answer, like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Hey Candace, do black people like fried chicken?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Of course we do, and we can see in the dark.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Did you know that?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's my time.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Y'all have a good night.
lines.label: fluff
